We are treating Fihr as living in a very different time

He was born in the year 300 in Syria. moved down with the black stone to Mecca

== Notes for [[Item:Q110437|Q110437]] ==

Progenitor/ Found of Tribe of ''Banu Quraysh''

* Fihr was called Quraysh and whose tribe was called after him.
* Fihr was a personage of great influence & power, and the famous tribe/ clan of ''Banu Quraysh'' are his descendants.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kilab_ibn_Murrah

Source 2: http://community.fortunecity.ws/tattooine/spock/67/gen/saadid.htm
--------------------
The father of Quraish family (Bani Quraish).
--------------------
فهر

Fihr is counted among the direct ancestors of Muhammad. In the lineage of Muhammad from Adnan, Fihr precedes Muhammad by eleven generations.

Fihr defended Mecca against the Himyarite King of Yemen who wanted transfer Kaaba to Yemen.

A sharp engagement followed in which Himyar were defeated, and their King Hassan was taken prisoner by Fihr for two years until he paid his ransom.

He is the common ancestor of all the ten promised paradise as all of them belonged to the Quraysh tribe.

----

Source:

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fihr_ibn_Malik

----

----

Lineage of Zubayr ibn Awwam who descended from Asad ibn Abd al-Uzza. < [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asad_ibn_Abd_al-Uzza Wikipedia] >

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
